name: Southwest Beef Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Cucumber Salsa, Southwest Relish, and Southwest Guacamole.
2. Cut the steak diagonally across the grain into thin slices, each 2 x 1/8 inch.
3. Mix remaining ingredients except tortillas in a glass or plastic bowl; stir in beef until well coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
4. Preheat oven to broil setting.
5. Place beef slices on rack in broiler pan, about 2 to 3 inches from heat.
6. Broil the beef until brown, about 5 minutes.
7. Assemble each tortilla by placing a portion of the beef mixture, some Cucumber Salsa, Southwest Relish, and Southwest Guacamole in the center.
8. Fold one end of the tortilla up about 1 inch over the beef mixture.
9. Fold the right and left sides over the folded end, overlapping slightly.
10. Fold down the remaining end to enclose the filling.
11. Serve with additional salsa, relish, and guacamole.
